case_title: VAGHAR HAGHIRI VS. TESLA, INC. DOING BUSINESS AS TESLA MOTORS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100113330) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAGHIRI, VAGHAR

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-20-2020 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT TESLA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)
